metadata.description: Research papers survey (2023-2025) across three topics

topics.Topic1_CCN_NDN_Vehicular: CCN/NDN vehicular networking, precaching in IoV

references.title: Proactive Content Caching Scheme in Urban Vehicular Networks
references.abstract_summary: Proactive content caching in urban vehicular networks
references.relevance: Directly related to proactive caching in vehicular networks
